scene_1.visual_plan: Start with a medium shot of the model looking directly at the camera in a softly lit bathroom environment with natural light coming from a window. The camera is on a tripod with a gentle slow zoom-in to create a personal and engaging atmosphere. After the first line, cut to a close-up of the KYOGOKU Color Shampoo bottle held naturally in the model’s right hand, clearly showing the label. Then cut back to the medium shot with the product still in her hand near her face as she continues speaking. The depth of field is shallow, focusing on the model and product while softly blurring the background.
scene_1.dialogue: 使い始める前に知っておきたかったことなんですけど、ずっと白髪隠しで失敗してばかりで困っていました。

scene_2.visual_plan: Open with a medium shot of the model gazing directly into the camera in the same bathroom setting. The camera remains on a tripod with a subtle zoom as the model speaks. Immediately after the first sentence, cut to a POV shot of the shampoo being poured onto the hand to show texture and application. Return to the medium shot where the model holds the KYOGOKU Color Shampoo bottle in her right hand near her face, smiling softly. Keep a shallow depth of field to highlight her expression and the product clearly.
scene_2.dialogue: KYOGOKUのカラーシャンプーに出会って、これは白髪も自然にカバーしながらリンゴ幹細胞やヒアルロン酸で髪と頭皮をしっかり養ってくれるんです。

scene_3.visual_plan: Begin with a medium shot of the model looking into the camera in the same bathroom setting with warm natural lighting. The camera is steady on a tripod with a slight push-in. After the first line, cut to a secondary cinematic angle from the side showing the model gently touching her shiny, healthy hair with the shampoo bottle placed visibly on the counter next to her. Return to the medium shot as she finishes the dialogue while holding the product smoothly in her right hand near her chin for the final product emphasis.
scene_3.dialogue: 今では髪が健康的でツヤツヤになって、洗うたびに花園のような香りに包まれて癒されています。
